sources.title: Daddy Daughter Trip | Rob Schneider | Full 2025 Comedy Family Movie
sources.description:
Daddy Daughter Trip | Rob Schneider | Full 2025 Comedy Family Movie

Larry Bublé, an ambitious yet broke inventor, is struggling to keep his family eating and sleeping indoors. When he promises his eight-year-old-daughter the spring break vacation of a lifetime, he is forced to get more inventive than ever before.

2022.  Stars: Rob Schneider, Edward Enriquez-Cohen, Monty Franklin
